pages.text: The $(item)Trial Chamber Skyseed$() — $(item)tuff bricks$() and $(item)copper blocks$() around a $(item)diamond$(). A buried copper-and-tuff arena of trial spawners and vaults, guarded by a $(item)Breeze$().
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A grand $(o)trial chamber$() sunk deep into a rocky island, built from $(item)tuff$() and $(item)copper$(). A ladder shaft is the only way in. Drop down into a lantern-lit arena ringed by $(item)trial spawners$() — and a $(item)breeze$() waiting dead centre.

$(bold)The loop$()$(br)Clear a spawner's waves and it drops a $(item)trial key$(); spend keys on the $(item)vaults$() around the room for armour, enchanted gear and emeralds. Nothing here respawns, so take your time and pick your fights.

$(bold)Going ominous$()$(br)Drink an $(item)ominous bottle$() (raid these from a pillager outpost island) before you drop in. The spawners turn ominous, the fights get harder, and clearing them yields $(item)ominous trial keys$() for the centre $(item)ominous vault$() — the one holding the $(item)heavy core$() for a $(item)mace$().
$(bold)Crafting$()$(br)Ringed $(item)tuff bricks$() and $(item)copper blocks$() around a single $(item)diamond$(). The island carries a little copper and iron ore of its own.
